generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Thermometer1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Thermometer2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor with -55°C to +125°C range and ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Thermometer1, DS18S20Thermometer2
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPy, TimeSeriesDatabase
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heats content within the styrofoam box enclosure"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Distributes thermal energy within the enclosure"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Embedded controller hardware interfacing with physical components"
]

instance ThermalIncubator : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system for precise temperature regulation in laboratory or medical applications"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Thermometer1, DS18S20Thermometer2, RaspberryPiController
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the thermal incubator's structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPy
]

instance ThermalBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model described by differential equations for thermal dynamics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SciPy
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Communication server for data exchange between sensors and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, OptimizationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, ControlService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight messaging protocol for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, SimulationService, OptimizationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, ControlService
]

instance SciPy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Used for numerical optimization and solving thermal dynamics equations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, SimulationService
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores historical data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assesses safety and optimal performance through real-time data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Replicates and forecasts Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs algorithmic optimization for thermal control"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTemperatureSetting
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates current system state using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimate
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages supervisory control actions for the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationCommand
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system safety based on thermal thresholds"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of system performance against optimal parameters"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in system components"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system"
]

instance ForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of future thermal behavior under current conditions"
]

instance OptimalTemperatureSetting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended temperature settings for optimal operation"
]

instance ActuationCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust heatbed or fan for thermal control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to commands from the RabbitMQ server to control the fan and heatbed, with control states shared as feedback. A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver for command execution."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update model parameters using sensor data to maintain fidelity. Monitoring systems validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria, detecting violations that trigger corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ messaging server facilitates communication, 1-Wire bus supports sensor connectivity, and built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth enable wireless communication. Network topology is not specified in the source document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is deployed on-premises using a Raspberry Pi, with support for cloud deployment due to RabbitMQ's flexible scalability across on-premises and cloud environments."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin uses monitoring systems to assess the Physical Twin's safety and operational optimization; when violations are detected, human operators or algorithmic interventions adjust the Physical Twin accordingly."
]
